events.title: US Strikes Iran, Vows to Reimpose Naval Blockade
events.desc: The United States launched a fresh wave of strikes on Iran and President Donald Trump vowed to reimpose a naval blockade, prompting Tehran to respond with attacks on countries in the region. Tehran launched attacks on other US allies in the region, including Jordan, which said it had shot down four missiles from Iran.

events.title: Iran and US Launch New Attacks, Battle for Control of Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: Iran fired ballistic missiles at a U.S. air base in Jordan on Tuesday and the United States attacked Iranian targets for five hours in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz that has pushed up oil prices to four-week highs.

events.title: US Says It Has Completed Its Latest Wave of Strikes on Iran
events.desc: The U.S. military said late on Monday its forces have completed their latest wave of strikes on Iran that the U.S. Central Command began earlier in the day at the direction of President Donald Trump. During the five-hour mission, U.S. forces successfully struck military targets across Iran including Bushehr, Chah Bahar, Jask, Konarak, Abu Musa, and Bandar Abbas.

events.title: Trump Says US Attacking Iran Capabilities Related to Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: President Donald Trump told reporters on Monday that the United States was attacking Iran's capabilities related to the Strait of Hormuz, amid renewed military action between the two countries. Trump also said that it could be that there are Iranian drones in Cuba.

events.title: Trump Says the US Will Take Out Pickaxe Mountain in Iran
events.desc: U.S. President Donald Trump on Monday said that the U.S. would take out Pickaxe Mountain in Iran, as he warned that Washington would continue to hit the country hard. "We're going to take out Pickaxe Mountain. Tell the Iranians to be ready," Trump said in an interview on the Hugh Hewitt Show.

events.title: Trump Says US to Strike Iran's Pickaxe Mountain Nuclear Site
events.desc: Satellite imagery has detected recent construction at the underground facility known as Pickaxe Mountain, which the US now targets. This indicates a potential escalation in the conflict, with direct targeting of Iran's nuclear capabilities.

events.title: UAE Says Iranian Missiles Struck Oil Tankers in Strait of Hormuz, One Sailor Killed
events.desc: One Indian crew member was killed and eight others were wounded when two Emirati oil tankers were struck by Iranian cruise missiles in the Strait of Hormuz, the United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence said on Tuesday. This incident marks a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict.

events.title: US and Iran trade fire as tensions rise over Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: Within hours of the latest US attacks, Iran said it had struck US military assets in Kuwait, Jordan, Bahrain and Oman. This tit-for-tat exchange highlights the rapidly escalating conflict between the two nations.

events.title: US and Iran trade strikes after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military says it hit missile sites and command centres while Iran says it attacked US bases. The exchange follows the attack on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, indicating a dangerous escalation.

events.title: US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried
events.desc: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday. This significant exchange of fire occurs during a period of heightened regional tension.

events.title: Big fall in oil, gas and cargo ships taking US-backed Hormuz route after new strikes
events.desc: Data shows a decline in the number of ships - many carrying oil and gas - going through the waterway after attacks this week. This highlights the impact of the conflict on global trade and energy security.

events.title: Trump threatens more strikes on Iran as Tehran warns of 'fearless' response
events.desc: Speaking at a Nato summit, the president says the US will "probably" strike Iran again but added that "anything that happens will be over quickly". This indicates continued US intent for military action.

events.title: Russia readies to reroute exports from Sea of Azov after Ukrainian attacks
events.desc: Ukraine says drones hit 11 Russian vessels in the Azov Sea, targeting tankers, dry cargo ships, and a tugboat overnight. This demonstrates ongoing kinetic activity in the Black Sea region.

events.title: Yemen's Houthis launch missiles at Saudi Arabia after strikes on Sanaa airport
events.desc: The Iran-backed Houthis blame Saudi Arabia for the attack in Yemen's capital and say they targeted Abha airport in response. This indicates continued Houthi kinetic actions and regional spillover.

events.title: Lebanon, Israel hold talks in Rome on implementing framework deal
events.desc: Beirut is hoping for progress towards securing an Israeli withdrawal from southern Lebanon under a U.S.-brokered deal, although expectations for swift progress were low. This indicates ongoing diplomatic efforts amidst regional tensions.
